name: Recurring Deposit (RD) Calculator India

before.shortDescription: Use RupeeKit's free RD calculator to estimate your Recurring Deposit maturity amount and total interest earned in India. Plan your savings effectively.
before.metaDescription: Use RupeeKit's free RD calculator to estimate your Recurring Deposit maturity amount and total interest earned in India. Plan your savings effectively.

after.shortDescription: Estimate your RD maturity amount and total interest with RupeeKit's free Recurring Deposit Calculator for India. Plan your savings effectively.

changeSummary: Updated short and meta descriptions for clarity and SEO.
Expanded formula explanation for better user understanding.
Refined example for practical application and word count.
Added new FAQs covering TDS threshold and detailed premature withdrawal penalties.
Introduced 'How To Use' section for step-by-step guidance.
Included 'Assumptions' and 'Common Mistakes' for user awareness.
Added specific 'Content Sections' to enrich the page with relevant information on RDs in India and taxation.
